item.title: Medline Industries, LP: Namic Preceptor Manifold, custom, Medline Product Number/SKU 64037107; Extravascular blood pressure transducer Recall
item.product: Namic Preceptor Manifold, custom, Medline Product Number/SKU 64037107; Extravascular blood pressure transducer
item.summary: Medline has identified the presence of particulate within the fluid path of the Manifolds. Product details: Namic Preceptor Manifold, custom, Medline Product Number/SKU 64037107; Extravascular blood pressure transducer
item.affectedPeople: US (nationwide) and AE, AU, CA, JP, KR, NL, SG, SK.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
